description_long: This is an L-shaped counter with a modern, utilitarian design, featuring a main counter section and a perpendicular extension. The main section includes three drawers on one side and a double-door cabinet on the other, providing ample storage space. The counter surface is flat and spacious, suitable for serving, working, or displaying items. The structure appears to be made primarily of wood or laminated composite, with a smooth, matte finish. The drawers and cabinet doors are equipped with simple, functional handles. The overall design is practical and robust, making it suitable for use in urban environments such as reception areas, service counters, or administrative offices.
description: L-shaped counter with drawers and cabinet, featuring a smooth, matte surface and practical storage options.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the side with two drawers and the long counter extension, highlighting the L-shape.
description_view_1: View 1 displays the back of the counter, showing the solid panel and the perpendicular extension.
description_view_2: View 2 presents the counter from the side, emphasizing the length of the extension and the main counter body.
description_view_3: View 3 reveals the front with three drawers and a double-door cabinet, as well as the main workspace surface.
